content:
@Steven Winship and I are seeing this error on develop, this commit: https://github.com/IQSS/dataverse/commit/11600c6d3c5cc58d2b4dd63529144d3b78aaaaef

100 is the usual apt/apt-get return error code
maybe transient issue or some package is down?
Yeah, I'm hoping it's a transient issue.

I just tried again and it worked!
